races.name: Betfred Oaks (Investec Oaks, Group 1, Fillies' Classic)

runners.notes: Winner of Cheshire Oaks (Group 2) at Chester, leading favourite for Epsom Oaks 2026; strong class and stamina; Aidan O'Brien, Ryan Moore; sourced from web search 2026-06-02
Winner of Irish 1,000 Guineas; reversing previous Newmarket form; well-regarded for class and stamina improvement
Winner of Musidora Stakes at York (Group 2 equivalent); very strong progression this spring; 4th in Fillies' Mile last year
3rd in 1000 Guineas; mix of class and potential for extended trip
Progressive profile with recent win; potential threat at bigger price
Impressive in Lingfield Oaks Trial; strong Ballydoyle support
3rd in Cheshire Oaks trial behind Amelia Earhart; clear promise shown
Progressive filly, lightly raced; winner at 2
Has shown flashes of quality; Balding trainer
Ballydoyle support; depth of O'Brien team very strong
Last in Curragh race; outsider; more O'Brien depth
